definitions.divergence_rate: fraction of routes whose complete edge sequence differs
definitions.first_choice_accuracy: fraction whose first predicted edge equals the first observed edge
definitions.first_divergence_index: zero-based edge index and number of common prefix edges
definitions.interpretation_warning: These are descriptive associations and do not establish that turn costs cause route errors.
definitions.prefix_match_ratio: common prefix edge count divided by observed path edge count
definitions.rejoin_before_target: a shared downstream node after divergence, excluding the common target
definitions.suffix_cost_gap: observed suffix cost minus predicted suffix cost under checkpoint weights

turn_angle.method: planar atan2(cross, dot) using graph x/y coordinates
turn_angle.unavailable_when: incoming/outgoing edges are discontinuous or either coordinate vector is degenerate
